location: On a corpse lying in a shallow pond northeast of the Cerulean Coast Site of Grace (and southeast of Ellac River Downstream), guarded by lightning-charged ram enemies roaming the pond.

source.name: Corpse in a pond northeast of Cerulean Coast, guarded by lightning rams

tactics: From Castle Front, head south through the poison swamp and Ellac River Cave to Ellac River Downstream, then drop down the rocky platforms toward Cerulean Coast.
From Cerulean Coast grace, ride northeast to a pond marked by blue flowers; the corpse with the bottle sits in the middle of it.
Lightning rams patrol the pond — they usually ignore you unless approached closely, but can charge; they're not individually dangerous but can catch you off guard mid-loot.
This area borders both Gravesite Plain and Cerulean Coast proper, so don't be thrown off if a guide places it in either region.
lore: Yet another creation of the realm's traveling perfumers, tuned in this case to discharge crackling lightning rather than fragrance when put to use as a weapon.

builds.name: Dex/Faith Lightning build
builds.why: Even D/D scaling in Dex and Faith gives faith-leaning Dex builds a pure lightning damage option; pairs well with the Rolling Sparks Ash of War (looted from a scarab near Shadow Keep) for wide multi-hit lightning explosions against large enemies.
